introSection: Klondike Gold Rusher is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Wild Waves Theme & Water Park in Federal Way, Washington, USA. It was one of ten rides added for the park's 25th season in 2002.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The cars have a mine-cart theme.

sections.title: Etymology
sections.content: The "Klondike Gold Rush" was a mass-migration to the Klondike region of Canada after gold was discovered there in 1896.

fullText:
Klondike Gold Rusher is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Wild Waves Theme & Water Park in Federal Way, Washington, USA. It was one of ten rides added for the park's 25th season in 2002.

Yellow track and blue supports.

The cars have a mine-cart theme.

The "Klondike Gold Rush" was a mass-migration to the Klondike region of Canada after gold was discovered there in 1896.
